meaning: adj.(飞机、导弹、人造卫星等)起飞(或升空)前的 为(飞机等)起飞(或升空)作准备的
examples: Airlines' flight service managers ensure that flight attendants adhere to personal appearance and preflight requirements.
I preflight the seat and hop in.
The crew ran through the preflight procedures.
His instructor left him at the plane to perform a preflight inspection, authorities said.
Scott obtained this timer from Bulova during preflight training at the request of a friend.
